history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark hair, wearing a black and white trucker hat with a yellow Bass Pro Shops logo, a white t-shirt with a light blue graphic that reads "D12BHEEL" in reverse, and dark pants, takes a mirror selfie in a bathroom. He has a black crossbody bag slung over his shoulder. The bathroom has beige tiled walls and a dark countertop with a white sink. A reflection of another person in a white t-shirt can be seen in the mirror behind him. The lighting is bright and natural, creating a casual and slightly posed mood. The overall color palette is neutral with pops of color from the hat and t-shirt graphic.
